positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a mystical nocturnal forest scene. Central composition features stylized silhouetted elements: a full moon rising over intertwined, wispy trees with glowing sap lines. Include gentle, curved lines suggesting fireflies or spirit whispers weaving through the leaves. The overall aesthetic is celestial and ethereal, using deep indigo, sapphire blue, and glowing chartreuse accents against a muted, dark background. Focus on clean vector lines and a limited color palette for perfect screen printing, high contrast, simple yet complex design, centered for apparel.
